text:
Thus spake Tim Vanderhoek (vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca):

> Optimal places for newlines include after commas separating clauses
> and after periods.

Ah. Didn't know that. Thanks.

I'll redo the manpages, also with the merges from Alexey.

Alex
